title: GEMglPolygonOffset
description: set the scale and units used to calculate depth values

messages.description: Specifies a scale factor that is used to create a variable depth offset for each polygon.
Specifies a constant factor that is used to create a variable depth offset for each polygon.

arguments.description: Specifies a scale factor that is used to create a variable depth offset for each polygon.
Specifies a constant factor that is used to create a variable depth offset for each polygon.
